wadasamsa.
Planets in the Third House
The Sun-—Makes the person courageous. The mind
becomes resourceful and restive, successful. Bad for
brothers if afflicted. Discredit through letters. Position of
the Sun in the 3rd is one of the strong points in a
horoscope.
The Moon.—Generally changes in occupation are
indicated, fond of travelling and active minded. Wife will
be fair. The subject possesses.good knowledge. Rather
indifferent to spiritual values of life. Subordinate to wife.
Attached to children. If however the Moon is waning,
cruel, miserable, impious and unscrupulous. An
unfavourable position for peace of mind, if afflicted.
Mars.—This position is bad for brothers and sisters.
Liability to danger and accidents by journeys. Brave,
Worried on account of family misunderstandings.
Reckless, pioneering and unprincipled. May be troubled
with ear defects or even deafness. If the house is further
afflicted, it shows thoughts of suicide or violent tendencies.
